---
title: "LTC Pleuss Grab Bag Topics"
subtitle: "What Should We Talk About?"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo

  pdf:
    documentclass: article
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

<iframe src="topics.png" width="140%" height="900" style="border: none;">
</iframe>


```{r, include=FALSE, out.width="50%", fig.align='left'}
knitr::include_graphics("topics.png")

```
